discovery.text: Farm-to-table Kitsilano gem right next door to Maenam. Local, seasonal BC ingredients. Rustic-cozy atmosphere. Great brunch option for Saturday morning. Rating 4.4/5 (1,478 reviews). Good casual-but-quality pick.

narrative.summary: Farm-to-table Kitsilano gem right next door to Maenam. Local, seasonal BC ingredients. Rustic-cozy atmosphere. Great brunch option for Saturday morning. Rating 4.4/5 (1,478 reviews). Good casual-but-quality pick.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "We tried the December Tasting Menu, the Duck breast, and the wine.

The tasting menu is so great and we enjoyed it. The duck breast is also great however we feel it’s a bit plain, there’s no garnish or complementary dishes around it. Our server had kindly warned us about this tho which we appreciate but still.

The dessert and appetizer are amazing. We bought a glass of pinot noir and it tastes great too. Great ambience, and great service overall!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Came here to celebrate my friend’s birthday 🎂 Absolutely love the farm to table concept and overall really had a wonderful dining experience.

We ordered the kale salad to start an I must say that was my favorite dish of the night!!! I would come back just for that kale salad too 🥬 We also ordered the chickpea fritters, a pasta and mussels. All the dishes were really tasty but my favorite is the night was hands down the kale salad 🙌🏻

Service and ambiance were excellent and would consider dining here again :)"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "boyfie and i got a last minute reservation here in december

extremely happy there is no dresscode cos we looked like bums for date night lmfao

wine recommendation was great, staff were super pleasant and lovely to talk too, had great recommendations as well for other local businesses.
food was fabulous, definitely more sharey but hey, food is meant to be shared anyways.
i take horrible photos but the food was really good and u just need to trust me.

also get the cheese platter. dont be a skimp. just get it. finish off slowly. enjoy the ambiance. i think it was my favourite part of the meal, simply because it was the perfect ending to a wonderful night & bottle of wine."
